title: WTFS Disk Usage Scanner
description: Where's The Free Space — directory-level disk usage analysis with segmented bar charts (deps/cache/source) and WebKit HTML viewer

title: DTF Cache Cleaner
description: Delete Temp Files — multi-target cache discovery with dry-run/force modes, progressive cleanup levels, Docker/sudo support

title: BTAU Backup Manager
description: Back That App Up — sparse disk image discovery, mount/unmount, backup scheduling with progress tracking

title: DEVDRIVE Volume Manager
description: Developer drive management with multi-volume APFS support, cache protection, inbox protocol, and Finder integration

title: SSD Spotlight Manager
description: Slows Sh*t Down — mds CPU monitoring, volume index status, scan/exclude commands with WebKit HTML dashboard

title: STFU Source Tree Forensics
description: Source Tree Forensics Utility — dependency analysis, fingerprinting, duplicate detection, project archival

title: macOS Finder Integration
description: CloudMounter-level native integration: custom .VolumeIcon.icns, Finder sidebar entries, 5 Automator Quick Actions, automount LaunchAgent

title: Menubar Helper Daemon
description: Swift AppKit menubar app with multi-domain health monitoring, volume status (df -k for APFS accuracy), WebKit viewer IPC

title: Inbox Work Queue
description: Cross-project work queue with JSON protocol for cache relocation, DTF protection, volume queries, and prefetch hooks

title: .pkg Installer Package
description: macOS .pkg installer with preinstall/postinstall, launchctl bootstrap, real user detection, portable path patching across 38 payload files

title: Code Review Fixes
description: 3 CRITICAL + 1 HIGH fixes: state.sh readonly ordering, scan.sh div-by-zero, Python triple-quote injection via env vars, state_done logging

title: Integration Test Suite
description: 12/12 headless module tests: all modules exit 0, state.json valid, HTML generation verified in viewer mode

title: INSTALL.md Documentation
description: 8-section installation guide covering .pkg install, manual install, post-install verification, LaunchAgent management, uninstall, troubleshooting

title: SwiftUI Native Port Wave 2
description: 5 module views (WTFS/DTF/BTAU/DevDrive/SSD), DashboardView with 5-card grid, NavigationSplitView routing, VolumeWatcher live data — 914 insertions, 9/9 tests pass

title: DEVDRIVE Formation Showcase
description: Interactive formation tree at localhost:3001 with live APM polling, agent inspector, volume monitoring, AgentLock integration, wave gate progress

title: Native Service Layer
description: Pure-Swift async service layer replacing shell-out scripts: DiskMonitorService (du/df), CacheDiscovery (target enumeration), VolumeWatcherService (DiskArbitration callbacks), SpotlightService (mdutil wrapper), InboxService (JSON work queue), ProcessRunner (async shell bridge)

title: LFGKit Shared Framework
description: Swift Package Manager multi-target layout: LFGKit shared library (Constants, SizeFormatter, ProcessRunner), LFGApp GUI target, lfg-cli command-line target, SizeFormatterTests with full coverage

title: Data Models & AppState
description: Observable AppState with @Published properties: DiskSnapshot, VolumeProfile, InboxItem, LFGModule, ModuleStatus — replaces state.json file polling with in-memory reactive state

title: Permissions & Entitlements
description: App Sandbox entitlements for disk read/write, network client, user-selected file access; hardened runtime with com.apple.security exceptions for shell subprocess execution

title: Login Item & SMAppService
description: SMAppService-based login item registration replacing LaunchAgent plist — launch at login toggle in Settings, ServiceManagement framework integration

title: Settings UI & MenuBarExtra
description: SwiftUI Settings scene with scan interval, cleanup thresholds, volume watch list; MenuBarExtra with systemImage, live disk gauge, quick-action menu for mount/unmount/scan

title: Full Native SwiftUI UI
description: Replace WebKit HTML viewer with native SwiftUI: Swift Charts for disk usage bar/pie charts, Gauge views for volume health, Table for file listings, searchable/sortable NavigationSplitView with sidebar badges

title: Native STFU Forensics View
description: SwiftUI STFU module: dependency treemap visualization, duplicate fingerprint table with diff viewer, project archive manager with drag-and-drop, Spotlight metadata inspector

title: XPC Privileged Helper
description: XPC privileged helper daemon (LFGPrivilegedProtocol) for operations requiring root: mdutil -i off/on for Spotlight exclusion, cache cleanup in /Library and /System paths, APFS volume creation/deletion

title: Authorization Plugin & Escalation
description: SMJobBless-based privileged helper installation with authorization rights, launchd plist embedding, code-signing requirement for XPC connection validation

title: Notarization & DMG Packaging
description: Apple notarization workflow: codesign with Developer ID, notarytool submit/staple, DMG disk image with background art and /Applications symlink, replacing .pkg installer for App Store-independent distribution

title: Sparkle Auto-Update
description: Sparkle 2.x framework integration: EdDSA-signed appcast feed, background update checks, delta updates, user-facing update UI with release notes, Homebrew cask formula as alternative channel

title: DevDrive v2 Self-Correcting Architecture
description: Replaces crude hdiutil sparseimage model with native APFS volumes in root container (diskutil apfs addVolume -quota). Self-correcting reconcile loop classifies drift into 8 categories (MISSING_LINK, STALE_TARGET, REAL_DIR_DRIFT, UNMOUNTED_VOL, OVERSIZED, BAND_BLOAT, SNAPSHOT_LOCKED, SWAP_PRESSURE) with idempotent fix actions. State in ~/.config/lfg/devdrive_state.json with root_free_gb_history ring buffer to distinguish APFS sawtooth from real leaks. 6-wave build plan complete.

title: US-001: Pressure Observers — Read-Only Disk State Watchers
description: 4 read-only observers (PurgeableWatch, ClangCacheWatch, BandBloatWatch, DockerWatch) sampling disk state every 60s into 288-sample ring buffer in devdrive_state.json. CLI: lfg devdrive pressure / history. All tests pass. LFG-32.

title: US-002: Reconcile Loop — Dry-Run Drift Classifier
description: ReconcileLoop with classify_drift() covering 8 drift categories. CLI: lfg devdrive reconcile / doctor. io.lfg.devdrive-reconcile.plist LaunchAgent template. Results logged to reconcile_log.jsonl. LFG-33.

title: US-008: State File v2 and devdrive_state.json Schema
description: v2 state schema with volumes array, forest topology, metrics ring buffer. Migration from devdrive_forest.json. All modules read/write through state module API. LFG-34.

title: US-003: Reconcile Actions — Idempotent Repair with Confirmation
description: Repair actions for each drift category: fix_missing_link, fix_stale_target, fix_real_dir_drift, fix_unmounted_vol, fix_band_bloat, fix_snapshot_locked. Default dry-run, --apply flag required. lsof check prevents relocation of dirs with open handles. LFG-35.

title: US-004: Native APFS Volume Backend — Create, Delete, Quota, Snapshot
description: apfs_volume.py wrapping diskutil apfs: create_volume (with -quota -role U), delete_volume, rename_volume, set_quota, list_snapshots, take_snapshot. CLI: lfg devdrive adopt <path>. LFG-36.

title: US-007: FSKit Overlay Exploration — macFUSE 5.2 Proof of Concept
description: Python FUSE PoC: mount at /tmp/devdrive-overlay routing reads/writes to /Volumes/DDRV<N> by path rules. Performance measurement vs direct volume access for 1000 file ops. Go/no-go decision documented. LFG-38.

title: US-005: v1-to-v2 Migration — Sparseimage to APFS Volume
description: migrate_v1.py: preflight checks, rsync -aHAX, shasum sample verify, mount-point preservation, 24h rollback window. CLI: lfg devdrive migrate v1-to-v2 / rollback <vol>. APM notifications per step. LFG-37.

title: US-006: LaunchAgent Install and Reboot Verification
description: io.lfg.devdrive-reconcile.plist installed to ~/Library/LaunchAgents/. Reconcile loop runs every 5 minutes. Legacy automount plist preserved until reconcile runs successfully post-reboot. CLI: lfg devdrive setup --reconcile. LFG-39.

title: US-009: Menubar Pressure Indicator and History Graph
description: Menubar color-coded disk free: green (>10GB), yellow (5-10GB), red (<5GB). Click opens WebKit viewer with D3.js 24h time-series chart. Annotated pressure events as vertical markers. 60s refresh from devdrive_state.json. LFG-40.

title: US-010: Claude Code Integration — Eliminate Symlink Dependency
description: ~/.claude/projects and ~/.claude/tasks symlinks point to native APFS volume mount points. Reconcile loop monitors ~/.claude symlinks as forest entries with auto_repair: true. mkdir -p succeeds for all project memory directories. LFG-41.

title: Disconnect Detection
description: Detect offline external volumes, log DISCONNECTED status in devdrive_state.json, prevent reconcile actions on unavailable drives

title: Fallback Directories
description: Redirect broken symlinks to ~/DevDrive/<id>-fallback/ local directories, ensuring dependent tools continue working when external volumes are disconnected

title: Reconnect Subcommand
description: lfg devdrive reconnect [id|--all] — detect reconnected volumes, rsync fallback data back to volume mount points, restore original symlinks

title: Reconcile Loop Resilience
description: 60s LaunchAgent polling with state transition detection: ONLINE -> DISCONNECTED -> FALLBACK -> RECONNECTING -> ONLINE lifecycle per volume

title: APM Notifications
description: POST to localhost:3032/api/notify on volume state changes — disconnect, fallback activation, reconnect completion, sync errors

title: Fleet.json v1.4
description: Fleet registry v1.4 schema adding fallback_dir and reconnect_policy (auto|manual|disabled) per drive entry

title: Health Dashboard
description: lfg devdrive health — color-coded CLI status table showing volume state (ONLINE/DISCONNECTED/FALLBACK), free space, last reconcile, fallback size per drive
